content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "SUM and REPLACE". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/contest/920/problem/F
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer T, the number of test cases. Then for each test case: The first line contains two integers N and K, the number of elements and the target sum. The second line contains N integers, the elements of the array.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print the minimum number of operations required to make the sum of the array elements equal to K, or -1 if it's impossible.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Sort the array and try to replace elements from the end to make the sum equal to K
